lines.en: Next, please. What is your name?
My name is Tom. I am in Grade Five.
First, let me check your height and weight.
lines.zh: 首先，我量一下你的身高和体重。

lines.en: You are one hundred and forty centimeters tall.
Am I taller than last year?
Yes, you grew five centimeters. Now let me check your eyes.
lines.zh: 是的，你长了五厘米。现在检查眼睛。

lines.en: I hope my eyes are still good.
Your eyesight is fine. Remember to exercise more.
lines.zh: 你的视力没问题。记得多运动。
